text: As I move from the quiet, clinical hallway—its glass and silence bordering on sterile—into a vibrant exhibition space, I feel a jolt of curiosity and subtle transition. The wall before me pulses with thoughts about research, innovation, and coexistence; I sense an intellectual buzz, as if possibility itself is displayed and refracted in the colored lights and bold statements. It’s energizing, but slightly overwhelming, as if the promise of discovery here expects something of me in return.
